version.description: Semantic version of the template content (a text change bumps this).

channel.description: The channel this template's text is authored for.

codeSet.description: The governed CodeSet ref providing the template's coded content / per-audience text (doc 02 §9).

text.description: The per-locale plain-language text (BCP-47 key → text), rendered by pure param substitution.

params.description: The substitution parameters a request must supply (every `{{param}}` in the text).

description:
A governed **notification template** (doc 05 §4.2). Content is templated and references a governed
CodeSet (`codeSet`) for its coded content; `text` is the per-locale plain-language i18n map keyed by
BCP-47 locale. `params` declares the substitution parameters a request must supply — a request whose
params do not cover the template's declared set is a render error, so the goldens stay total.
